emails.subject: Weather Review
emails.body: Weather Review Attached please find a Weather Long Description, modified pursuant to our conversation this morning. I will change the CDD Product Typre description as well. Also, last week we changed the reference to the price quote to remove reference to "per unit of volume". Please review and offer approval/comments. David: For your ease of reference, bolding represents additional language; italics represents changes. Should I be changing the Norway and UK components as well, or will that be done by PCG London? (I am more than happy to do it.) Dale

emails.subject: Re: Weather Review
emails.body: Re: Weather Review Looks good to me It should probably get one last look by Mike Corbally, too. Dale Neuner on 12/27/99 10:33:58 AM
